message:
feat(messaging): add service-boundary surface and speculative publish leak guard

src/messaging/service.rs:
- Add ServiceBoundaryError with 7 variants for namespace validation,
  morphism compilation, control registration, and health-threshold
  calibration failures
- Add ServiceBoundary struct that composes NamespaceKernel, Morphism
  import/export plans, ControlRegistry, and LeakMonitor into a single
  bounded service surface
- Add ServiceBoundaryBuilder with fluent API for namespace, morphism,
  control scope, and health threshold configuration
- Add validate_request_subject() for namespace containment checks
- Add compile_import/export_plan() with morphism compilation
- Add register_control_handler() for control-plane handler registration
- Add health_check() returning calibrated threshold status
- Add comprehensive tests: namespace validation, morphism round-trip,
  control registration, health threshold, builder defaults

src/messaging/fabric.rs:
- Add #[must_use] annotation to SpeculativePublishAttempt to prevent
  silent drops of unresolved speculative attempts
- Remove Clone derive (resolved field makes Clone semantically wrong)
- Add resolved: bool field tracking whether confirm() or
  abort_due_to_conflict() was called
- Add Drop impl that debug_assert!(self.resolved) to catch leaked
  attempts in debug builds

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
